name: Latitude
description: Latitude — Prompt management and LLM evaluation platform for versioning, testing, and deploying AI prompts.

seo.title: Latitude — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Latitude: Latitude — Prompt management and LLM evaluation platform for versioning, testing, and deploying AI prompts.

when_to_use: Managing and versioning LLM prompts across production apps
Running evals and regression tests on prompt changes before deploy
Collaborating on prompts with a team via a shared prompt library
Analyzing prompt performance with built-in observability traces

pros: Open-source core appeals to dev teams
cons: Feature surface still narrower than incumbents
review.verdict: A solid open-source-leaning prompt platform; best when your team treats prompts as code.
review.best_for: Engineering teams managing prompts as versioned artifacts with evals
review.not_for: Simple apps with a handful of static prompts

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
